idea-plugin.name: DPG
idea-plugin.description:
Language support for .dpg (DPG / Declarative PostgreSQL) source files.

  • Syntax highlighting via the DPG file type
  • Format on save via dpg fmt
  • Diagnostics, hover, go-to-definition, and completions via dpg-lsp

Requires dpg-lsp on $PATH. Download the binary from the GitHub Releases page.
